Oh well, it's not the only character so I just gotta look elsewhere!
Thanks for the quick answer <:AkoSmile:585588274484215818>

Cureent banner is Xu, dore, daff, myiram.

Xu is a poison support with high base dmg early (dmg falls off at ch8, but good late game support)

Dore is a dps who scales badly with investments. He's decent for early story clears (falls of at ch8ish)

Myriam is a support frequently used end game. Shes okay in the early game but cant carry you.

No opinions on daff
Daff is a jack of all trait dps that is very difficult to use, and needs OE for end game content

**New Unit Copypasta (xu edition)**

This is a day ~~1~~ ~~2~~ 4 first impression of Xu based on top EN players trying her out.

**Is She Good?**
- Good defensive support and general gap filler for teams.
- S-tier sub dps for poison teams.
- For low level new players (lv50 and below) she can solo carry story mode.

**Should I Pull Xu?**
- One copy (E0) is highly recommended.
- E1 and E2 provide small benefits/QOL and are not required.
- E3 and OE are only worth it in dedicated poison teams.

**Should I Pull Her Wheel?**
- It's great to have (especially with her E2) but she doesn't need it to work. You can have her hold other supportive wheels, it's not a big deal.

**How To Build Xu**
- Xu is a very flexible support and doesn't need any specific wheel or covenant to be good.
- Example wheels: Dusk & Dawn; Birth of a Soul; her own SSR wheel; Gift of Decay (Nymphaea wheel); Silent Banquet (Karen wheel); keyflare wheels (if used as keyflare bot)
- Example covenants: Burial Grounds' Sighs; Re-evolution; Dreams of Medicine; Life Drain (if used as keyflare bot)
- In Faded Legacy stages (story chapters 1-9 and Phantasmal Dive) Xu can hold R wheels (Gluttony, Emerge, Frenzy, Whisper, Aged).
